settings.text:
Michael Demartino a navy intelligence commander, and a veteran who served in the Afghan War, and his son Max age 13 are the co-founders of MIGLIORE ® a charitable, and trend-setting brand based in Exeter, NH.

Throughout Micheal's life, the military has been very impactful . He has always been taught to respect and help those who have served our great country and has taught his son to do the same. So when he learned that he could help those who have served our country he jumped at the opportunity.

That's why 22% of all profits from clothes with the American flag on them will go to the Wounded Warrior Project ® (https://www.woundedwarriorproject.org) the 22% symbolizes the number of those who have taken their lives while in service. Additionally, 10 % of all other profits will also go to the Wounded Warrior Project ®.

All the products that are made are made here in the U.S. and directly support our local communities. We are proud of the amazing Men and Women who have served to make our dreams possible. Thank you, service members, and I hope you all enjoy our exceptional products.
